notes: Full pub food menu captured (specials, appetizers, soups, salads, sandwiches, entrees, pizza, desserts). Soups list cup/bowl pricing (cup in price_cents). Pizzas list medium/large (medium in price_cents, large in price_note). No vegetarian/GF marks on the menu (Beyond Burger and Portobello sandwich are plant-based but unmarked). Beverages captured by name from the bar page; the page showed price ranges (cocktails ~$13-16, wine-by-glass ~$8-11) rather than per-item prices, so individual glass_cents are approximate/null and noted here.

dishes.name: Macaroni Alfredo
dishes.description: Macaroni noodles in a house made Alfredo sauce with chicken, broccoli and spinach. (Limited time special.)

dishes.name: Loaded Baked Potato
dishes.description: Extra large baked potato, loaded with bacon, cheddar and Jack cheese, green onion and sour cream.

dishes.name: Kobe Beef Sliders
dishes.description: Three sliders with cheddar cheese and your choice of fries, tots or coleslaw.

dishes.name: 34th Ave Nachos
dishes.description: Tortilla chips topped with melted cheese, black olives, tomatoes and jalapenos. Served with guacamole, house salsa, and sour cream.

dishes.name: Wings
dishes.description: 8 hearty chicken wings one of 5 ways - Buffalo, BBQ, Salt and Pepper, buffaque, or Sweet and Spicy Asian.

dishes.name: Avocado Louis
dishes.description: Whole avocado sliced in quarters topped with bay shrimp and drizzled with house dressing.

dishes.name: Quesadilla
dishes.description: Jack and cheddar cheese melted in a fresh flour tortilla. Served with sour cream, guacamole and homemade salsa.

dishes.name: Hummus Plate
dishes.description: House made hummus. Served with cucumber, green peppers, roasted red peppers, kalamata olives and tzatziki.

dishes.name: Coconut Prawns
dishes.description: 8 breaded and coconut crusted prawns fried to golden brown. Comes with sweet Thai chili sauce.

dishes.name: Mozzarella Sticks
dishes.description: 8 fried mozzarella sticks with ranch and marinara sauce.

dishes.name: Bacon Wrapped Scallops
dishes.description: 6 scallops wrapped in thick cut honey bacon and drizzled in house made sauce.

dishes.name: Whiskey Crab Bisque
dishes.description: Crab chunks in a creamy Cajun style bisque laced with Jameson Irish Whiskey.

dishes.name: Three Bean Chili
dishes.description: Savory pork chili topped with cheddar cheese, sour cream, and green onion.

dishes.name: Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Classic Caesar with a kick! Crisp romaine lettuce tossed in creamy Caesar dressing with Feta and Parmesan cheese.

dishes.name: Insalata Caprese
dishes.description: Sliced vine ripened tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and whole leaf basil topped with sea salt, extra virgin olive oil, and balsamic vinegar.

dishes.name: Cobb Salad
dishes.description: Fresh romaine tossed in house bleu cheese dressing. Topped with bacon, black olives, shredded cheddar and Jack cheese, tomatoes, green onion and hard boiled egg.

dishes.name: Wedge Salad
dishes.description: Crisp wedge of iceberg lettuce topped with bacon, red onion, tomatoes, and bleu cheese dressing and crumbles.

dishes.name: Spinach Salad
dishes.description: Fresh spinach tossed in a tangy honey mustard dressing and topped with bacon, tomato wedges, feta cheese and toasted walnuts.

dishes.name: Taco Salad
dishes.description: Crisp romaine tossed in a chipotle ranch dressing and topped with black olives, tomatoes, avocado, and sour cream. Choice of chicken or beef.

dishes.name: Madrona Burger
dishes.description: Hand formed and seasoned ground beef piled high with cheddar cheese, avocado, bacon and mayo on a toasted Kaiser roll.

dishes.name: Beyond Burger
dishes.description: Plant based Beyond burger topped with cheddar cheese, mayo, and avocado. Served on toasted kaiser roll.

dishes.name: The BLTA
dishes.description: The classic with a little extra. Crisp lettuce, vine ripened tomatoes, thick hand cut bacon and avocado. Served with mayo on toasted sourdough.

dishes.name: The Reuben
dishes.description: House roasted corned beef, sliced and grilled with sauerkraut. Topped with melted Swiss cheese and served on toasted rye bread.

dishes.name: Irish Dip
dishes.description: Braised corned beef and melted Swiss on a fresh hoagie roll. Topped with horseradish mayo and served with a side of au jus.

dishes.name: Cubano
dishes.description: Savory pulled pork, thinly sliced ham, Swiss cheese, cilantro, jalapeños and grilled onions with chipotle mayo.

dishes.name: Grilled Portobello Sandwich
dishes.description: Grilled Portobello mushroom topped with grilled onions, red peppers, feta cheese, micro greens, and finished with house balsamic reduction.

dishes.name: Crispy Chicken Hawaiian Bacon Wrap
dishes.description: Breaded chicken tenders with applewood smoked bacon, romaine lettuce, pineapple chunks, cheddar Jack cheese and tossed in ranch dressing.

dishes.name: Chicken Gyro
dishes.description: Grilled chicken on toasted flatbread with lettuce, onions, diced tomatoes, tzatziki, and feta crumbles.

dishes.name: Blackened Salmon Sandwich
dishes.description: Blackened salmon filet, with avocado and chipotle mayo on a toasted kaiser roll.

dishes.name: Guinness Beef Stew
dishes.description: Irish recipe of beef, onion, potato, carrot and a wee touch of Guinness. Served with green salad and toasted bread.

dishes.name: Mussels
dishes.description: Healthy portion of mussels in a broth of smoked tomatoes, white wine, garlic, cilantro and sweet vermouth. Served with toasted French bread.

dishes.name: Corned Beef & Cabbage
dishes.description: Tender corned beef slow roasted in house, served with cabbage and garlic mashed potatoes.

dishes.name: Fish & Chips
dishes.description: Three generous pieces of beer battered cod deep fried to golden crisp. Served with French fries, coleslaw and house made tartar sauce.

dishes.name: Union St. Steak
dishes.description: Grilled 8 oz Pendleton ranch steak cooked to your liking and finished with a balsamic reduction served with asparagus and mashed potatoes.

dishes.name: Honey Glazed Salmon
dishes.description: 6 oz salmon filet in a house made honey glaze with broccoli and Spanish rice.

dishes.name: Chicken Marsala
dishes.description: Chicken breast filet sautéed in a sweet marsala sauce on a bed of mushrooms and spaghetti noodles.

dishes.name: Classic Cheese Pizza
dishes.description: Just a classic cheese pizza.

dishes.name: Pepperoni Pizza
dishes.description: Pepperoni and cheese.

dishes.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
dishes.description: Grilled chicken, red onion, sweet BBQ sauce, mozzarella, pineapple and cilantro.

dishes.name: Greek Pizza
dishes.description: Feta cheese, kalamata olives, red onion, spinach and oregano.

dishes.name: The Full Monty Pizza
dishes.description: Salami, pepperoni, Canadian bacon, Italian sausage, black olives, roma tomatoes, red onions and mushrooms.

dishes.name: Margherita Pizza
dishes.description: The traditional pizza. Fresh mozzarella, basil, fresh sliced tomatoes and extra virgin olive oil.

dishes.name: Seasonal Cheesecake
dishes.description: Ask about our current selection. Served with 2 scoops of vanilla bean ice cream.

dishes.name: Caramel Apple Pie
dishes.description: Served warm with vanilla bean ice cream.

dishes.name: Chocolate Molten Lava Cake
dishes.description: Warm chocolate cake with a melted chocolate core drizzled with raspberry sauce and served with vanilla bean ice cream.
